summary: Bug fix verification for 'Navigation view not updating changes made in Display Layout'. The fix adds a useEffect in NavigationView.tsx that reloads hudLayout, hudPositions, and hudScales from localStorage whenever activeView changes to NAVIGATION. All core functionality verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Toggle element OFF in Display tab -> Navigation view hides element (Compass Rose, Weather Overlay)
VERIFIED: Toggle element ON in Display tab -> Navigation view shows element
VERIFIED: Scale change (XL = 1.3) in Display tab -> localStorage updated correctly
VERIFIED: localStorage persistence works - nav_hud_layout and nav_hud_scales updated on toggle/scale change
VERIFIED: useEffect in NavigationView.tsx (lines 349-356) reloads HUD config when activeView === NAVIGATION
VERIFIED: CustomEvent listeners (hud-layout-changed, hud-positions-changed, hud-scales-changed) provide live sync
VERIFIED: HudLayoutView.tsx dispatches CustomEvents on config/position/scale changes (lines 257-271)
VERIFIED: NavigationView is always mounted (hidden via CSS) per App.tsx lines 575-580

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for Display Layout -> Navigation view sync verified. Key implementation: NavigationView.tsx has useEffect (lines 349-356) that reloads hudLayout/hudPositions/hudScales from localStorage when activeView changes to NAVIGATION. This ensures changes made in Display tab are reflected when navigating back. CustomEvent-based sync (lines 358-386) provides secondary live sync mechanism. Test flow: Guest Login -> Display (sidebar) -> Toggle elements or change scales -> Navigation (sidebar) -> Verify changes reflected. Key data-testids: compass-rose-container, nav-weather-overlay, hud-toggle-showCompassRose, scale-XL.

toggle_element_off.details: Toggled Compass Rose OFF in Display tab, navigated to Navigation, element NOT in DOM

toggle_element_on.details: Toggled Weather Overlay ON, visible in Navigation view (47° CLOUDY panel)

scale_change.details: Changed Turn Instructions scale to XL (1.3), localStorage updated correctly

localStorage_persistence.details: nav_hud_layout and nav_hud_scales updated on toggle/scale changes

activeView_reload.details: useEffect reloads HUD config from localStorage when switching to NAVIGATION view

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Navigation view not updating changes made in Display Layout
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: NavigationView was not reloading HUD config from localStorage when becoming active
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added useEffect in NavigationView.tsx (lines 349-356) that calls loadHudLayout(), loadHudPositions(), loadHudScales() when activeView === NAVIGATION
bug_fix_verification.test_method: Playwright automation - toggled elements OFF/ON in Display tab, verified visibility changes in Navigation view
